For Family Law Firms

Your clients are already documenting.
Are you ready?

Right now, your clients are screenshotting texts, saving emails, and building chaotic evidence files you'll need to make sense of anyway. Liaison.legal makes that evidence court-ready before they even walk through your door.

Months

of verified evidence ready before discovery

0 hrs

manual sorting of client screenshots

1-click

court-ready export for any date range

The evidence problem

What you deal with today — and what changes tomorrow

✕ What your clients bring you today

  • ✕

    Hundreds of unorganized screenshots with no verified timestamps

  • ✕

    No read receipt documentation — "I never saw that" claims go unchallenged

  • ✕

    Alterable evidence — no cryptographic integrity to prove nothing was changed

  • ✕

    Hours of paralegal time per case sorting, organizing, and printing messages

What if the evidence was already ready when they called?

  • ✓

    Every message cryptographically hashed and immutably logged from day one

  • ✓

    Exact read receipts with timestamps — admissible, not arguable

  • ✓

    SHA-256 hash chain makes any tampering cryptographically detectable

  • ✓

    Attorney-side dashboard with pre-sorted, pre-verified chronological record

  • ✓

    One-click PDF or CSV export formatted for court submission

See how it works →

Simple workflow

How it works

01

Client uses Liaison.legal

Your client downloads Liaison.legal — free forever for parents. Every message is automatically hashed and logged from their first conversation.

02

Firm activates the case

When you take the case, activate attorney access for $99. You get instant access to the full verified evidence ledger — no back-and-forth with your client.

03

AI audits against the court order

Upload the existing court order. The AI forensic auditor cross-references every message against it and flags potential deviations for attorney review.

04

Attorney reviews and files

Review AI-flagged items, run your legal analysis, and export a court-formatted PDF with one click. All source messages are included.

Attorney-side tools

Built for how family law actually works

🤖

AI Forensic Auditor

Featured

Upload the existing parenting plan or court order. The AI cross-references every message in the ledger against the order's specific provisions — pickup times, communication protocols, restriction clauses — and surfaces each potential deviation with the exact source message and timestamp.

  • → Flags potential violations with source message citations
  • → Every finding is grounded in raw message data — no hallucinations
  • → "Potential Deviation" framing keeps findings within UPL guardrails
  • → Attorney reviews and applies legal judgment — AI identifies, you decide
🔥

Conflict Heatmap

Visual timeline showing communication frequency and tone escalation. Instantly identify the periods of highest conflict for focused review.

📄

One-Click Court Export

Generate a formatted PDF or CSV with all messages, timestamps, read receipts, and hash proofs — ready to attach to a motion.

🏢

White-Label Client Portal

Offer Liaison.legal under your firm's branding. Your clients see your firm name, your logo — fully white-labeled.

📊

Multi-Case Management

Manage evidence ledgers across all your active cases from a single dashboard. No separate logins, no context switching.

⚖️

Designed with UPL compliance in mind

The AI identifies potential deviations — it does not provide legal advice. Every flagged item is presented as a "Potential Deviation" for attorney review. All findings are 100% source-grounded to raw messages. You apply the legal judgment; the AI handles the evidence organization.

Simple, transparent pricing

Pay for what you use

Per Case

$99 /case

Activate attorney access on a single case. No subscription required.

  • ✓ Full evidence ledger access for one case
  • ✓ AI forensic audit against one court order
  • ✓ One-click court export (PDF + CSV)
  • ✓ No expiry — access until case closes
Get Started
Best for firms

Firm License

$250 –$750/mo

Unlimited case activations. Full firm dashboard. Scales with your caseload.

  • ✓ Unlimited case activations per month
  • ✓ Multi-attorney firm dashboard
  • ✓ White-label client portal option
  • ✓ Priority support & onboarding
  • ✓ Custom court order templates
Schedule Walk-Through

Parent accounts are always free. Firm pricing is for attorney-side access only. Contact us for volume pricing or multi-office arrangements.
